creator: tmclaugh@sdf.lonestar.org
text:
The problem stems from a hiccup in -STABLE which affects packages built
during that time.  The backout is noted here:

http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/cvs-src/2007-November/084046.html

The quick fix is to rebuild sudo locally.  The long-term fix is for me
to update the port to the latest release so the package is rebuilt.

tom

-- 
| tmclaugh at sdf.lonestar.org                 tmclaugh at FreeBSD.org |
| FreeBSD                                       http://www.FreeBSD.org |
